summary: Full regression of multi-tenant SaaS refactor. Backend: 10/10 pytest tests pass (auth register/login/me/401, duplicate-email 400, demo seed 7 cats / 39 items / bread ['Πίτα','Διπλή πίτα','Ψωμάκι'] / double_meat_price=1.5, starter-menu seeding on new register, strict tenancy isolation for menu/orders/analytics, category+item CRUD with cascade delete, customization update, orders/next-number auth-gated & auto-increments, analytics date-filter scoped per user). Frontend: /login demo login works, wrong password shows inline error, /register creates a fresh restaurant and lands on PDA with restaurant_name in header, PDA category tabs + Σουβλάκι χοιρινό customization modal (bread/extras/sauces/+1,50€ double-meat) + submit posts order and increments to #002 with success toast, Menu Management add-category works (success toast), Analytics page shows scoped data (1 order / 3,50€ for the new tenant only) with hourly chart, pie chart, popular items table, and date presets. Auth protection: /menu without token redirects to /login; logout clears token and redirects. Test users cleaned up.

ui_bugs.issue: Bottom-right 'Made with Emergent' watermark overlays the submit button; Playwright center-click hits the badge. Real users are fine; still worth ~40-56px bottom padding on the order panel footer.

action_items: (Optional/LOW) Add bottom padding on OrderPanel footer so submit button clears the Emergent watermark.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py stores created_at as ISO string and does string-range queries; works because UTC ISO is lexicographically ordered, but storing native datetime would be more correct long-term.
next_order_number relies on all writes using UTC ISO strings — consistent today. OK.

seed_user_menu is called AFTER users.insert_one but is not wrapped in try/rollback: if it fails, the user exists without a menu. Consider try/except with user deletion on seed failure, or make it idempotent.
PUT /menu/customization accepts empty option lists — no server-side sanity check (e.g., non-empty bread_options). Consider validation.
CORS_ORIGINS defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=False — fine for public API; document this.
seed_data.py has a mixed-script character (Cyrillic 'а' in one item id) — cosmetic only.
test_credentials: demo@peinokio.gr / demo1234 (working). Test users registered during testing were prefixed test_ and have been cleaned up.
seed_data_creation: Created ~1 test order via demo login (order_number auto increment) and 1 order via UI as test tenant. All temp test tenants (test_*@example.com) plus their categories/items/orders deleted at end of run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (10 tests, all pass) cover auth, tenancy, menu CRUD, cascade delete, customization, orders, analytics. JWT token localStorage key: peinokio_token. Demo login: demo@peinokio.gr / demo1234. Register flow auto-logs-in and lands on '/'. Analytics preset button labels: 'Σήμερα','7 μέρες','30 μέρες'. Playwright: use JS click on [data-testid=order-submit-btn] to bypass Emergent-watermark overlap.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs discovered. Multi-tenant refactor is functioning correctly on both backend and frontend.
